A.instruction: Cross-reference all contractors against the approved vendor list and flag any without a valid purchase order for Q2 2026.

results.english: Cross-reference all contractors against the approved vendor list and flag any without a valid purchase order for Q2 2026.
Retrieve all employees who have not completed their annual compliance training module and send reminders to their line managers.
Audit all service accounts created in the last 90 days and flag any that have not been reviewed or do not have an assigned owner.
Review all contracts expiring in the next 60 days and flag those with auto-renewal clauses that require 30 days notice to cancel.
Identify all opportunities in the pipeline that have had no activity in the last 14 days and escalate to the sales manager for review.

novel_instruction.english: Generate a variance report comparing actual spend against forecast for all cost centres in Q1 FY2026, flagging any that exceed 10% variance.
